heading: Grant Access to MongoDB Support Only for Database Logs
body:
- Select General Settings from the Settings menu in the navigation bar.

- Toggle Block MongoDB Support Access to Atlas Cluster Infrastructure and Logs to `Yes`.

* Select the ellipsis icon (...) to the right of the cluster.

* Select Grant Temporary Infrastructure Access to MongoDB Support.

* Select Only database logs.

* Click Grant Access.

  IMPORTANT: You can grant MongoDB Support staff access only to database logs for 24 hours.
  Any downloads in progress won't be interrupted if you revoke this access. Database audit logs are
  not included in this access grant.
